problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: If Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
